name: Quick & Easy Dill Mustard
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the Dijon mustard with fresh chopped dill or dried dill weed.
2. Mix in the olive oil until well blended.
3. Serve with pâté or fish, or use as a sandwich spread.
4. It also makes a good addition to salad dressing.
5. Store any leftovers in the refrigerator.
